# Copilot Instructions

This document instructs GitHub Copilot to adhere to the following mandatory documents before writing any code:

1. [.claude/README.md](.claude/README.md)
2. [docs/ai/00_AI_MAP.md](docs/ai/00_AI_MAP.md)
3. [docs/ai/01_DNA.md](docs/ai/01_DNA.md)
4. [docs/ai/03_BUSINESS_MODEL.md](docs/ai/03_BUSINESS_MODEL.md)
5. [DESIGN_SYSTEM.md summary](DESIGN_SYSTEM.md)
6. [ROADMAP_LAUNCH.md summary](ROADMAP_LAUNCH.md)

# 8-Step Validation Checklist
1. Confirm understanding of project goals.
2. Review document 1: .claude/README.md.
3. Review document 2: docs/ai/00_AI_MAP.md.
4. Review document 3: docs/ai/01_DNA.md.
5. Review document 4: docs/ai/03_BUSINESS_MODEL.md.
6. Review summary of DESIGN_SYSTEM.md.
7. Review summary of ROADMAP_LAUNCH.md.
8. Ensure compliance with all non-negotiable rules below.

# Non-Negotiable Rules
- NO OpenAI usage.
- NO emojis in UI.
- NO flags.
- [Add any additional rules here]
